_doc: Raven Hollow BESTIARY FRAMEWORK (BACKLOG #76). A curated registry of ~63 SIGNATURE creatures spread across every biome and all seven families (undead, beast, insectoid, cultist, construct, aberration, spectral). This is the FRAMEWORK the later 1500-sprite art pass fills out -- each entry carries id, name (dark-fantasy tone), family, biome + zones, tier, base stats {hp,dmg,speed,armor}, an archetype (references data/combat_archetypes.json AI behaviors), a UNIQUE signature debuff (references data/status_effects.json or a documented 'new_debuffs' entry with an existing 'base' effect for the StatusSystem fallback), a loot_table ref (data/loot_tables.json), a death_anim placeholder key, and a lore blurb. Consumed by scripts/systems/bestiary_system.gd. spawn_table_for(zone) is derived from each creature's 'zones' list (falls back to biome). NO other file is edited; the sprites/anims are NOT part of this framework.

new_debuffs._doc: Signature debuffs documented HERE that are not yet in data/status_effects.json (the art/design pass may promote them). Each names a 'base' effect that DOES exist in the catalog; apply_signature falls back to that base so the debuff always lands a real StatusSystem effect until its own def is authored.

grave_chill.name: Grave-Chill
grave_chill.note: The cold of an open grave. Slows and numbs; a colder cousin of chilled.

rot.name: Rot
rot.note: Flesh souring where the creature touched. Ticks like poison, lingers like plague.

hemorrhage.name: Hemorrhage
hemorrhage.note: A deep tearing wound that will not clot; heavier than a common bleed.

despair.name: Despair
despair.note: The will drains out. Weakens the limbs the way grief does.

thread_snare.name: Thread-Snare
thread_snare.note: Bound in the black threads of the weavers. Movement crawls to a stop.

ash_lung.name: Ash-Lung
ash_lung.note: Breathed forge-ash. Each breath costs a little more.

ledger_mark.name: Ledger-Mark
ledger_mark.note: Your name entered in the debt. The mark drags at everything you are.

soul_leech.name: Soul-Leech
soul_leech.note: It drinks warmth, not blood. Bleeds the living slow and returns it to the thing.

venom_spine.name: Venom-Spine
venom_spine.note: Barbed venom worked under the skin. Stacks fast in a swarm.

brittle.name: Brittle
brittle.note: Struck by graven stone until the bones ring. Armor and strength crack.

freezing_grasp.name: Freezing Grasp
freezing_grasp.note: Drowned hands close on you cold enough to still the blood.

corrosion.name: Corrosion
corrosion.note: Acid ichor eating at flesh and steel alike.

dread.name: Dread
dread.note: A shade's nearness hollows the courage out of a body.

ember_burn.name: Ember-Burn
ember_burn.note: Cinder caught in the wound, burning down instead of out.

marrow_frost.name: Marrow-Frost
marrow_frost.note: Cold that reaches the bone and stays. The tundra's true bite.

silence_hymn.name: Hymn of Silence
silence_hymn.note: The choir sings the words out of you; spellcraft falters, will thins.

unmaking.name: Unmaking
unmaking.note: A thing that should not be leaves you a little less than you were.

field_gnawer.name: Field-Gnawer
field_gnawer.lore: Lean things that came in off the fallow strips when the harvests failed. They no longer fear a raised hand.

scarecrow_wight.name: Scarecrow Wight
scarecrow_wight.lore: Stitched from a debtor left too long on the post. It keeps the field it was set to keep, and takes what wanders in.

famine_husk.name: Famine-Husk
famine_husk.lore: What the lean years left standing. Its hunger did not end with its heart; it eats to remember eating.

blightfly_swarm.name: Blightfly Swarm
blightfly_swarm.lore: They boil up off the spoiled grain in a single grey cloud. One is nothing; the cloud strips a body to the ledger-name.

mudlark_cultist.name: Mudlark Penitent
mudlark_cultist.lore: Farmhands who signed the wrong ledger to keep the wrong land. They recite the debt at you like a prayer.

riverfork_drowner.name: Riverfork Drowner
riverfork_drowner.lore: The river keeps what it takes at the fork. Sometimes it gives a shape back, wrong, and hungry for company under the water.

bark_revenant.name: Bark-Revenant
bark_revenant.lore: Buried in the dead wood until the roots took the bones for their own. It walks in a skin of grey bark and old grief.

hollow_stag.name: Hollow Stag
hollow_stag.lore: Its antlers grew after it died, out through the skull, black and branching like the timber it fell in. It charges anything with a heartbeat.

orangefog_wisp.name: Orange-Fog Wisp
orangefog_wisp.lore: A light in the standing fog that answers when you call and is never where the answer came from. Follow it and you will not come out.

ledger_shade.name: Ledger-Shade
ledger_shade.lore: A clerk who died still owed and still owing. It walks the ledger roads counting the living against a book that was burned centuries back.

timber_crawler.name: Timber-Crawler
timber_crawler.lore: Too many joints, all of them wrong, weeping a sap that eats what it drips on. It wears the dead timber like a shell.

grey_moth.name: Grey Grave-Moth
grey_moth.lore: They feed on grave-flowers and carry the rot of them on their wings. The dust they shed settles in the lungs.

carrion_crow_flock.name: Carrion Crow Flock
carrion_crow_flock.lore: The Hollow's own birds. They are patient with the dying and impatient with everything else.

moor_wail.name: Moor-Wail
moor_wail.lore: A grief that outlasted its mourner and went looking for more. On the open moor its cry carries for miles.

bog_widow.name: Bog-Widow
bog_widow.lore: Wed to the peat and preserved by it. She still wears her grave-linens and still keeps the cold of the ground she came up from.

copper_leech.name: Copper-Well Leech
copper_leech.lore: The wells ran green and then they ran wrong. What lives in them now drinks the warmth straight out of a hand dipped for water.

grave_magda_shade.name: Grave-Magda, the Vetkan
grave_magda_shade.lore: They buried Magda at the crossing and she came back to the middle of Vetka to finish a sentence no one living remembers starting.

peat_shambler.name: Peat-Shambler
peat_shambler.lore: The finalized fields are full of them, filed and forgotten under the sod, and every so often one is not done.

rustmaw.name: Rustmaw
rustmaw.lore: It drinks the iron-fouled water of the vein until its hide is scaled with rust and its bite carries the same.

salt_stinger.name: Salt-Stinger
salt_stinger.lore: Palm-sized and patient, they wait in the salt reeds for anything warm to wade past.

mire_horror.name: Mire-Horror
mire_horror.lore: A thing the bog assembled out of everything it swallowed. It does not want to eat you so much as to add you.

iron_vein_ghoul.name: Iron-Vein Ghoul
iron_vein_ghoul.lore: Miners who went down the vein and came up changed, if they came up. They still dig, at anything soft.

cliff_stalker.name: Cliff-Stalker
cliff_stalker.lore: It runs the high ledges silent and drops on the road below. You hear the whisper passes only after it has already chosen.

basalt_golem.name: Basalt Golem
basalt_golem.lore: Cut from the black stone of Blestem and set to guard a maze whose walls have all fallen. It still guards where the walls were.

whisper_choir.name: Whisper-Choir
whisper_choir.lore: They took a vow of silence and then found a worse thing to sing. In the passes their hymn is the wind until it is on top of you.

spire_gargoyle.name: Spire-Gargoyle
spire_gargoyle.lore: Carved to watch the Black Spire and never told to stop. It drops off the eaves like falling masonry with intent.

ridge_harpy.name: Ridge-Harpy
ridge_harpy.lore: Woman to the waist and worse above it. She nests where the road pinches and takes travelers one at a time off the back of the line.

frost_wight.name: Frost-Wight
frost_wight.lore: The tundra keeps its dead standing and cold. This one has been cold long enough to make cold of its own.

thread_weaver.name: Thread-Weaver
thread_weaver.lore: It tends the black filaments strung between the posts of the threadlands. Step into the web and the web tends you.

gravemark_colossus.name: Gravemark Colossus
gravemark_colossus.lore: A grave-marker the size of a gate, raised for a name no one carved. It walks the rows and reburies whatever it catches above ground.

archive_sentinel.name: Archive Sentinel
archive_sentinel.lore: It keeps the cold colonnades of the Archive quiet. It considers the living a form of noise.

pale_stalker.name: Pale-Stalker
pale_stalker.lore: White on white, it is the snow until it is teeth. In the long dark of Black Night it hunts by the heat you cannot hide.

black_night_revenant.name: Black Night Revenant
black_night_revenant.lore: It fell in the capital's worst winter and the winter never let it lie. It fights the way it died, cold and unhurried and sure.

tomb_golem.name: Tomb-Golem
tomb_golem.lore: Slabs of a broken tomb dragged back together by something that resented being disturbed. It seals intruders in with itself.

cinder_hound.name: Cinder-Hound
cinder_hound.lore: Bred, or made, in the heat of the vents. Its coat is banked coals and its charge leaves the grass smoking.

forge_thrall.name: Forge-Thrall
forge_thrall.lore: Fed to the Forge that Eats and given back as tool and worker both. It does not remember the debt it is still paying.

debt_collector.name: The Debt-Collector
debt_collector.lore: It keeps the Debt Pit's accounts and it never closes one. When it says your name it is reading it off a page that already has your name.

ash_wraith.name: Ash-Wraith
ash_wraith.lore: The shape smoke takes when someone burned in it and did not get to leave. It is in every breath near the vents.

slag_horror.name: Slag-Horror
slag_horror.lore: The Forge's waste, poured out and left to cool wrong. It cooled into hunger and a body to carry it.

brazier_imp.name: Brazier-Imp
brazier_imp.lore: Small things that live in the killing-floor braziers and dart out to snatch the offerings. And the fingers that leave them.

the_gift_mourner.name: Mourner of the Gift
the_gift_mourner.lore: They walk the red fields where the small shoes lie, grieving on a loop, and they do not want to grieve alone.

ember_cultist.name: Ember-Sworn
ember_cultist.lore: They gave the Forge their oath and their skin and got heat back for both. They spread the fire because misery loves it.

drowned_clerk.name: Drowned Clerk
drowned_clerk.lore: Greyhollow's drowned ledger is worked by hands like these, still filing under the water, still owed their wage.

canal_lurker.name: Canal-Lurker
canal_lurker.lore: It knows the canal maze better than the drowned who built it. It takes you where the walls are highest and no one can see the water move.

brine_shade.name: Brine-Shade
brine_shade.lore: A drowning that never finished. It reaches up from the pier-shadows with the same cold it went down in.

dock_swarm.name: Dock-Rot Swarm
dock_swarm.lore: They breed in the rot under the boards and come up in a chittering carpet when the tide is low and the guard is asleep.

ledger_drake.name: Ledger-Drake
ledger_drake.lore: It nests on the drowned archives and its scales are pressed pages. What it breathes dissolves the ink of you off the world.

morven_siren.name: Morven Siren
morven_siren.lore: The reach's drowned choir sings the ferries onto the rocks. Those who wash up sing too, in time.

cave_crawler.name: Cave-Crawler
cave_crawler.lore: Pale, eyeless, everywhere. They pour off the ceiling toward warmth and the sound of breathing.

bloodstone_horror.name: Bloodstone Horror
bloodstone_horror.lore: It grew where the threads converge over Lilith's tomb, fed on everything the pit was given. It is mostly the givings now.

lichen_lurker.name: Lichen-Lurker
lichen_lurker.lore: It wears the biolume lichen like a hide and glows soft and lovely right up until it is close enough to touch.

thread_spinner.name: Thread-Spinner
thread_spinner.lore: It strings the depths with the same black thread that carries the transmission stones' voices. Its web listens back.

deep_wight.name: Deep-Wight
deep_wight.lore: Buried deepest, forgotten longest, and colder for both. It rises where the light of the surface has never once reached.

transmission_echo.name: Transmission-Echo
transmission_echo.lore: A voice the live stones caught and cannot let go of. It speaks in the words of the last person to die hearing it.

steppe_prowler.name: Steppe-Prowler
steppe_prowler.lore: There is no cover on the golden steppe, so it learned to be the grass. You never see the first one; you see the fifth.

listening_shade.name: Listening-Shade
listening_shade.lore: The steppe is called listening because something on it does. This is the something. Speak and it turns; keep speaking and it comes.

gale_swarm.name: Gale-Swarm
gale_swarm.lore: They ride the open wind in a stinging column and settle on whatever the wind runs into.

stonepath_wolf.name: Stonepath Wolf
stonepath_wolf.lore: The plain grey wolves of the wilds road. Common enough that folk forget three bites is how the fever starts.

thicket_boar.name: Thicket-Boar
thicket_boar.lore: Bad-tempered before it died and no better after. It holds the thickets off the stonepath and charges the road for sport.

wilds_hornet.name: Wilds-Hornet Swarm
wilds_hornet.lore: Nested in the road-side stones. Kick one nest and the wilds teach you why the path is stone and not shade.

plague_rat_swarm.name: Plague-Rat Swarm
plague_rat_swarm.lore: Angel Wings hides its want under mud and woodsmoke, but the rats keep an honest count of it. They carry the lean years from door to door.

sink_horror.name: The Sink-Horror
sink_horror.lore: When the quarter drowned, the water did not just take the people. It took what the place meant, and this is where the meaning went to live.

the_first_debt.name: The First Debt
the_first_debt.lore: The oldest name in the pit's book, the one every other debt is reckoned against. It has been paying since before the Hollow was named and it is not close to done.
